hooks.command: [ -f .understand-anything-ssot/knowledge-graph.json ] && printf '%s\n' '[kg-workflow] Before substantive code or architecture work on this prompt, invoke the kg-context-dispatch agent. It fans out in PARALLEL to kg-ssot-check, kg-impl-check, and kg-history-check to load SSOT intent (status/acceptance/contract/touch_budget), Impl dependents (blast radius), and prior decisions/sessions from Entire, then returns a compact briefing plus any side-effect warning. Consult SSOT first, Impl second. Skip greetings, meta questions, and trivial follow-ups — the dispatcher self-skips when there is no real code scope.' || true

[ -f .understand-anything-ssot/knowledge-graph.json ] && printf '%s\n' '[kg-workflow] This repo is bootstrapped with the dual KG workflow. For non-trivial code/architecture prompts, run kg-context-dispatch first (parallel SSOT + Impl + history lookup). Consult SSOT (.understand-anything-ssot) first, Impl (.understand-anything) second; respect touch_budget; derive tests from acceptance.' || true

if [ -f .understand-anything-ssot/knowledge-graph.json ] && [ -f .understand-anything/knowledge-graph.json ]; then if [ -f engine/scripts/ssot_diff.py ]; then python3 engine/scripts/ssot_diff.py --quiet 2>/dev/null; elif [ -f scripts/ssot_diff.py ]; then python3 scripts/ssot_diff.py --quiet 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; true
